div1.entryFree: Defuse (most M. Edd. diffuse, q. v.), to make indiscernible and shapeless: if but as well I other accents borrow, that can my speech d. Lr. I, 4, 2. Partic. --d == shapeless: to swearing and stern looks, --d attire and every thing that seems unnatural, H5 V, 2, 61.*--d infection of a man, R3 I, 2, 78.
